apiBaseUrl.title: Soter API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: The base URL of the Soter Enterprise API server.

organizationId.title: Organization ID
organizationId.description: The unique identifier for the organization in Soter.

employeeId.title: Employee ID
employeeId.description: The unique identifier for the employee within the organization.

email.title: Employee Email
email.description: The corporate email address of the employee.

department.title: Department
department.description: The employee's department within the organization.

role.title: Role
role.description: The employee's role or job function.

deviceToken.title: Device Token
deviceToken.description: Pre-configured device authentication token for the extension.

policyChannel.title: Policy Channel
policyChannel.description: The policy distribution channel (stable, beta, canary).

enrollmentMode.title: Enrollment Mode
enrollmentMode.description: Set to 'managed' to auto-enroll without user interaction.
